com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXConnectorRefinement


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXConnectorRefinement
    Interface to retrieve refined connectors to generalized connector relations and association between cavities.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<IXCavity> getCavitiesForSignal(IXSignal signal)
      Get the specialized cavities that map to this signal.
      java.util.Set<IXCavity> getCavitiesForWire(IXAbstractConductor conductor)
      Get the specialized cavities that map to this conductor.
      IXConnectorPinMap getConnectorPinMap(IXHarnessLevel level)
      Get connector cavity mapping applicable for the input harness level.
      java.util.Set<IXConnectorPinMap> getConnectorPinMaps()
      Get all connector cavity mappings.
      java.util.Set<IXConnector> getRefinedConnectors()
      Get all refined connectors.
      double getRefinedLength(IXConnector refinedConnector)
      Get the refined length which is the length between refined connector to the root node for the refined bundle fanout.

    • Method Detail

      • getRefinedConnectors

        java.util.Set<IXConnector> getRefinedConnectors()
        Get all refined connectors.
        Returns:
        a Set of refined connectors if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getConnectorPinMaps

        java.util.Set<IXConnectorPinMap> getConnectorPinMaps()
        Get all connector cavity mappings.
        Returns:
        a Set of cavity mappings if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getConnectorPinMap

        IXConnectorPinMap getConnectorPinMap(IXHarnessLevel level)
        Get connector cavity mapping applicable for the input harness level.
        Parameters:
        level - Harness Level for which associated connector pin map is requested.
        Returns:
        cavity mapping if any applicable for the input harness level, null otherwise.

      • getRefinedLength

        double getRefinedLength(IXConnector refinedConnector)
        Get the refined length which is the length between refined connector to the root node for the refined bundle fanout.
        Parameters:
        refinedConnector - Refined connector whose length from root node is requested.
        Returns:
        length between refined connector to the root node.

      • getCavitiesForWire

        java.util.Set<IXCavity> getCavitiesForWire(IXAbstractConductor conductor)
        Get the specialized cavities that map to this conductor. Returns an empty set if no cavity maps to conductor.
        Parameters:
        conductor - The conductor
        Returns:
        set of specialized cavities that map to the conductor

      • getCavitiesForSignal

        java.util.Set<IXCavity> getCavitiesForSignal(IXSignal signal)
        Get the specialized cavities that map to this signal. Returns an empty set if no cavity maps to signal.
        Parameters:
        signal - The IXSignal
        Returns:
        set of specialized cavities that map to the signal
